category.name: AI Voice & Audio
category.description: Text-to-speech, voice cloning, and audio generation tools

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.shortDescription: Realistic AI voice generator with voice cloning and voice agents
tools.description: ElevenLabs generates highly realistic AI voices from text and allows voice cloning with impressive accuracy. It supports multiple languages, tones, and voice tags like [whispers], [sarcastic], or [laughs]. Voice Agents enable real-time conversational bots for customer support and apps.
features: Voice tags for emotional delivery ([whispers], [laughs], etc.)
Voice Agents for real-time conversational bots
tools.bestFor: Audiobooks, podcast narration, YouTube voiceovers, voice cloning, customer support bots, call automation, and voice interfaces
